famous quote:
Yesterday I was clever, so I wanted to change the world. Today I am wise, so I am changing myself.
-Rumi
Interview Text:
Hannah Noble:

(part 4)

She remembers sitting in the quiet after the church destroyed her confidence that she could hear from God. She was questioning everything she used to know about Jesus, and asking "Where am I now? Do I hear you clearly, God or do I not hear you? Are you a figment of my imagination or are you real?" She didn't have one distinct moment where God said something and she believed, but it was a combo of little things where God really reminded her, no, you know me. You're my kid. You've always seen me.

David is still really going through questions, so are friends of his. She tells him she can't deny that she's had experiences with God. When she starts to deconstruct, she's met with this designation that "I am his. What I know about the gospel is true. What you know about my love for you is true."

While it was going on she asked, "God can you just show me where you were when I had that bad dream, and during the atopic pregnancy?" She says, "I know this is weird but there was a specific corner of my house He showed me, He had been standing there through it all." 

She's gotten to a place lately where she just tells David, "I don't need to convince you. In my deepest darkest moments, I met Him."
Music Video Instructions: Pray this as a request for God to really show us what his type of love for us is.
Music Video Description: Foreigner- I want to know what love is
